hero.eyebrow: AI-POWERED CX FOR SMALL & MID-SIZED BUSINESSES
hero.headline: Automate customer interactions and operate at the speed of today’s market—without hiring an expensive in-house AI team.
hero.body: DBX Solutions democratizes advanced technology for small and mid-sized businesses. We design, build, and run AI-powered customer experience solutions so you can keep pace with how business moves today—without paying high salaries for internal specialists. Serious automation shouldn’t be limited to the largest companies: we make it accessible and manageable, wired to your helpdesk, CRM, and the channels your customers already use—including WhatsApp, SMS, voice, and messaging. 20+ years of CX and integration experience, scoped for teams like yours.
points: Your team spends less time on repeat questions. Automation handles the routine; humans step in when it’s the right call.
Customers get answers faster on WhatsApp, SMS, voice, and messaging. We build on your stack instead of forcing a rip-and-replace.
You ship something real in weeks, measure it, then expand. No endless pilot theater.
hero.ctaPrimary: Book a 30-minute call to see how this would work for your business
ctaBullets: We review how you handle customer interactions today
We pinpoint what can be automated first for the fastest win
We outline how soon you can get started—with clear scope

value.equation: Speed × Clarity × Results you can see
value.noteText: The first workflow customers actually touch—running in your environment, tied to real tickets and data.

media.eyebrow: FROM FIRST WORKFLOW TO SOMETHING PEOPLE KEEP USING
media.title: A path your team can run without a manual the size of a phone book.
media.body: Pick one workflow that actually matters. Wire it to the tools you already have—WhatsApp, SMS, whatever your customers use. Get your front line comfortable. Then tighten it based on real conversations, not slide decks.
steps: Agree what “better” means and which systems we’re touching
Choose the first automation (small enough to ship)
Put it in production—not a demo sandbox
Train the people who talk to customers
Check the numbers monthly and adjust
media.caption: Small phases, real launches: ship something, learn, repeat.

trust.label: A few places we’ve helped teams like yours get unstuck:
industries: E-commerce brand juggling service and messaging
Regional clinics handling scheduling and reminders
B2B distributor with orders and logistics questions
Growing SaaS company sorting self-service and billing FAQs

services.title: Three practical offers
services.description: Concrete outcomes—not vague consulting buckets. Each ties to WhatsApp, SMS, voice, and messaging as needed, and to the CRM and helpdesk you already pay for.

cards.title: Customer Support Automation
cards.description: Automate conversations across WhatsApp, SMS, chat, and voice to cut response times and strip out repetitive work—your team steps in only when a human is really needed.
cards.outputs: Flows ready for production, with escalation that makes sense
cards.artifacts: Hooked to helpdesk / CRM, FAQs, and tickets
cards.kpi: Hours back to the team every week
items: WhatsApp, SMS, messaging, and voice—meet customers where they are
Answers grounded in your policies and knowledge base
Handoff rules your agents recognize so nothing feels like starting from zero

cards.title: AI Receptionist & Appointment Handling
cards.description: Handle inbound inquiries, qualify intent, and book or reschedule appointments across WhatsApp, SMS, and voice—so fewer opportunities slip away after hours or on a busy day.
cards.artifacts: Works with calendars and CRM fields you already rely on
cards.kpi: Shorter path from “interested” to “on the calendar”
items: After-hours coverage for predictable requests—you set the guardrails
SMS or WhatsApp reminders that match your real process

cards.title: Lead Qualification & Conversion
cards.description: Capture, qualify, and route leads instantly across WhatsApp and messaging so conversion isn’t limited by how fast someone can reply manually.
cards.kpi: More inquiries turning into a real next step
items: Fast replies on WhatsApp and SMS where buyers already are
Structured CRM fields so follow-up isn’t guesswork
Routing that matches your territories or teams

growth.title: Your AI, managed and expanded by experts
growth.intro: Once your first workflows prove value, the work shifts from “launch” to “leverage.” That’s where we focus on growth—not generic upkeep.
growth.body1: Our team runs maintenance, monitoring, and tuning so quality doesn’t quietly slide. As results hold, we expand your system into new use cases and more of your business—same disciplined delivery, same QA mindset, built to compound over time.
growth.body2: We stay accountable for outcomes months after go-live, not just the week you flip the switch.
growth.body3: That’s how growing companies scale the upside of AI without building a full internal practice.

model.title: Start small. Add scope when it’s justified.
model.intro: Get up and running quickly with a managed path designed for early impact: a first slice you can measure, plus a monthly number you can plan around—no open-ended meter.
model.body1: Either we run it for you, or we train your people to run it. Your call.
model.body2: You know what you’re buying each phase and what “done” looks like before we touch production config.
model.privacy: Don’t want to own day-to-day upkeep? We can run it under standard industry practice, and you’re not chained to us—switch vendors whenever you need to.

process.title: Three phases: talk, scope, ship—then keep it honest.
process.body: You get one person accountable end to end. We find where time leaks, pick an automation that pays for itself early, and wire it into your CRM, helpdesk, WhatsApp, SMS—whatever matters for your customers. Then we launch, train, and adjust from real tickets and messages.

steps.title: Discover & prioritize
steps.body: We talk to owners, leads, and the folks on the phone. We map the pain and pick one thing that should pay back fast—including which channels (WhatsApp, SMS, voice, messaging) deserve attention first.

steps.title: Design & scope
steps.body: Simple flows, a few success metrics, and a budget-sized scope. We fold in privacy and security expectations for your industry so there’s no surprise compliance lecture later.
steps.chip: Something you can sign off on

steps.title: Build, launch & coach
steps.body: We integrate, run a tight pilot, get your team comfortable, and tweak from real traffic—weekly at first, then on a rhythm that fits you.
steps.chip: Live in weeks, with backup when you need it

useCases.title: Scenarios we hear a lot
useCases.body: You don’t need a call center the size of a stadium to feel modern—you need the right automation in the right spots.
items: Customer support without hiring more agents
Never miss a lead or inquiry
Faster response times across WhatsApp, SMS, voice, and messaging
24/7 coverage for routine requests—without adding headcount
Give customers accurate answers on their schedule and build trust over time
Consistent, accurate answers on WhatsApp and messaging—even when your team is slammed or off the clock

contact.title: Tell us what’s going on
contact.body: Who answers customers today? Which channels matter most—WhatsApp, SMS, something else? What tools are already in play? Send that in the form and we’ll reply within one business day with a sensible next step.
contact.urgency: We only take a handful of deep-dive projects each quarter—ask us what the calendar looks like.
contact.bookingNote: Prefer to talk live first? Grab a 30-minute slot →
